signer.profilepermission.Action.Docs: The AWS Signer action permitted as part of cross-account permissions.

signer.profilepermission.Principal.Docs: The AWS principal receiving cross-account permissions. This may be an IAM role or another AWS account ID.

signer.profilepermission.ProfileName.Docs: The human-readable name of the signing profile.

signer.profilepermission.ProfileVersion.Docs: The version of the signing profile.

signer.profilepermission.StatementId.Docs: A unique identifier for the cross-account permission statement.
